headline: SLB Wins Multi-Well EPC Contract for the Baleine Phase 3 Development
summary: SLB expands its subsea backlog with a major Baleine Phase 3 EPC contract award, reinforcing its long-term offshore growth and partnership with Eni.

headline: What BKR's Management Still Has To Prove
summary: Baker Hughes has a powerful growth engine in one half of its business and a geopolitical headache in the other, and how management explains the balance tells you everything about the stock's path forward.

headline: Liberty Energy Shares Gain After Data Centre Infrastructure Partnership With SLB (LBRT)
summary: Liberty Energy Inc. (NYSE:LBRT) shares rose around 3% in premarket trading on Tuesday after the company announced a strategic partnership with SLB (NYSE:SLB) to deliver power generation and infrastructure solutions for data centres worldwide.

raw.headline: Liberty Energy Shares Gain After Data Centre Infrastructure Partnership With SLB (LBRT)
raw.summary: Liberty Energy Inc. (NYSE:LBRT) shares rose around 3% in premarket trading on Tuesday after the company announced a strategic partnership with SLB (NYSE:SLB) to deliver power generation and infrastructure solutions for data centres worldwide.

headline: Liberty Energy stock rises on data center power alliance with SLB
summary: Investing.com -- Liberty Energy Inc. shares traded approximately 3% higher in pre-market activity on Tuesday following the announcement of a strategic partnership with SLB to provide data center infrastructure and power generation solutions. SLB shares rose 0.8%.

raw.headline: Liberty Energy stock rises on data center power alliance with SLB

headline: SLB, Liberty Energy to Form Strategic Alliance for Data Center Infrastructure and Power
summary: HOUSTON & DENVER, July 14, 2026--Global energy technology company SLB (NYSE: SLB) today announced an agreement with Liberty Energy Inc. (NYSE: LBRT) to form a strategic alliance that will deliver modular infrastructure and integrated power generation solutions for new data center projects globally.

raw.headline: SLB, Liberty Energy to Form Strategic Alliance for Data Center Infrastructure and Power
raw.summary: HOUSTON & DENVER, July 14, 2026--Global energy technology company SLB (NYSE: SLB) today announced an agreement with Liberty Energy Inc. (NYSE: LBRT) to form a strategic alliance that will deliver modular infrastructure and integrated power generation solutions for new data center projects globally.

headline: SLB Partners With Liberty Energy To Deliver Modular Infrastructure And Integrated Power Generation Solutions For New Data Center Projects Globally
summary: The planned alliance will combine SLB’s modular data center infrastructure solutions and project execution expertise with Liberty’s modular power generation and intelligent behind-the-meter power management capabilities

headline: The Hidden Winners Inside SCHD - July 2026
summary: SCHD has returned just under 2% in the past month, outperforming the S&P 500 ETF SPY by almost 100 bps. Read more on SCHD's holdings here.
